description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. Use the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 image for the build job, which runs only on tags and the master branch, caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository, runs mvn clean package -B, and stores the target directory as an artifact. Add a deploy job named register that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, runs only on tags, and executes the commands: export IMAGE_TAG=$(echo -en $CI_COMMIT_TAG | tr -c '[:alnum:]_.-' '-'), docker login -u "gitlab-ci-token" -p "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" $CI_REGISTRY, docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG" ., docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG", docker tag "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG" "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest", and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest". The pipeline pushes the built Docker image to the GitLab Container Registry.
